items.title: I prefer working with a model that does not limit my curiosity, even if it’s not at the top of the benchmark charts. …
items.body: I prefer working with a model that does not limit my curiosity, even if it’s not at the top of the benchmark charts. The machine may run forever, but our time in this world is limited.
